title: R&D Projects
subtitle: Innovation is the engine of our growth. We invest continuously in research and development to offer advanced technical solutions that anticipate the needs of the automotive industry.

items.name: Government of Aragon
items.description: Projects co-financed by the Government of Aragon under industrial transformation and development aid programmes, with ERDF funds.

items.name: European Union
items.description: Projects co-financed by the European Union under energy efficiency and industrial innovation programmes.

contact.title: Interested in collaborating?
contact.body: If you are an automotive manufacturer, materials supplier or academic institution and want to explore joint R&D projects, get in touch with us.

meta.title: R&D Projects in Plastic Injection & Automotive Manufacturing | CEFA
meta.description: R&D in materials, injection processes and digitalisation for automotive OEMs. CEFA invests +15% annually in innovation for next-generation plastic components.
